Rocksmasher  
 

Lore Item No Trade Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY
Skill: 2H Blunt Atk Delay: 41
DMG: 47 Dmg Bonus: 144 AC: 35
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
STA: +25 HP: +100
Haste: +41%
WT: 0.0 Size: TINY
Class: WAR PAL SHD BER
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

▲ Page top
Dam Bonus Q
QuoteReply
# Dec 19 2002 at 7:29 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592256236336
3 posts
Stupid noob Q but what does the Dmg Bonus 31 Actually do Are you Guaranteed 31 dam on your weakest hit?
▲ Page top
RE: Dam Bonus Q
QuoteReply
# May 14 2003 at 5:48 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592759939660
33 posts
Almost corect. Bonus Damage gets added after the damage is figured.

Here are the 3 primary calculations. Min, MODE(the magic number - Ie what you will hit for more than anything else) and MAX.

Base Damage is the number that comes up in the stat. Like for this "47"

MIN = 1 + Bonus Damage
MODE = (2*Base Damage)+Bonus Damage
MAX = (((SKILL + STRENGTH)/100)*Base Damage)+Bonus damage.

Bonus damage is Based on your level, pre-haste delay of your wepon, and wether it is one handed or two handed. There is a list of how much bonus damage you get per level/delay at LUCY

THis person was 59 when he submited the graphic so this would be his MIN, MODE, and MAX if he had a skill in 2HB of 250, and a strength of 250

MIN = 1+31 = 32
MODE= (2*47)+31 = 125
MAX= (((250+250)/100)*47)+31 = 266

This doesn't enclude crits.

Hope this was helpfull.
▲ Page top
RE: Dam Bonus Q
QuoteReply
# Oct 02 2003 at 8:33 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592759897703
8 posts
except its not that way, first you havent added in the AC of the mob, which can knock the damage down to 1, and when i was 59 with this, my max damage was about 300damage. That is for a SK. Now i am 62, and so far the best non crit i have seen is 305, and the best crit i have had is 501. As for mode, that is not even close. Your Mode is so dependant on your atk its not even funny. With attack at about 1400, most hits would max out. With atk at 1000, my mode is around 180-200. Of course this depends on the mob's ac. All damage bonus does is add to your max damage, not add to your actual damage. If you play Diablo type games with actual numbers you will see... say XXX weapon does 1-100 damage, and you get a 15 damag bonus, you weapon now does 1-115, NOT 16-115. Not a huge difference, but THATS how it works. At least its the explanation that makes the most sense to me.

62 SK Weimei
Prexus

▲ Page top
As a Paladin, I can't think of much better!
QuoteReply
# Jun 17 2002 at 3:44 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592246548223
Sage
397 posts
This is the weapon I desire most. I've passed on the Lance of Thunder 52/46. I've passed on the Shovel of the Harvest 50/43. I've passed on Narandi's Lance and several other very nice uber weapons...just for the chance of this dropping. I've been training my 2-hand blunt skill JUST so I will be ready to wield this when it finally shows up. 2-hb is currently at 214. I have 11 more points to max 225.

Not only does it have an INSANE Ratio, it has 40% haste, adds 100 hit pts directly to your total AND adds another 25 Stamina for even MORE hit pts! Add to ALL of that, 35 AC, and, well, this hammer is pretty darn hard to beat. And since I have my epic Defender sword, I can always pull it out if I need a weapon with additional saves or need to be able to bash! With a Rocksmasher and my Epic, I can't see me ever needing another set of weapons.

Not to mention my Dorf Paladin will look COOL wielding this big-*** hammer! =)

Kneesmasher Ayebulger
Dwarven Knight
Torvonnilous Server

"Never Mistake Kindness for Weakness"

RE: Umm
QuoteReply
# Feb 06 2002 at 6:42 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591758433518
Scholar
160 posts
As an SK, there really isn't anything else I would rather have. This is good in so many ways aside from being a KILLER weapon with an insane adjusted ratio. Since the haste is built in, you can drop whatever haste item you happen to be using in favor of more AC/Resists/Etc. That kind of flexability combined with it's innate stats make this item double plus godly in my book. Sure, maybe I'll never see it, but I really hope I do someday.

# Dec 27 2002 at 6:42 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591779986122
View User Forum
63 posts
The haste on this is permanent, and it is 41%, not 40% like some people have said. If you get a haste item that drops in ToV, you can put money that its 41% haste. They made all ToV items that give haste have 41%. I don't know why the max is 41% but it is :P
